title: Generalization Bounds: PAC Learning and Sample Complexity
description: Theoretical analysis of quantum machine learning generalization, including PAC learning framework, Rademacher complexity, and sample complexity bounds for quantum models.
learningObjectives: Understand PAC learning framework for quantum models
Derive generalization bounds using Rademacher complexity
Analyze sample complexity of quantum machine learning
Apply VC dimension concepts to quantum circuits
Compare generalization of quantum vs classical models
